results.title: The Thrifty Angel
results.overview: Wei Yi (38), a stingy suona player from Sichuan Folk Orchestra, reluctantly takes in his neighbor's 6-year-old son A Yu. Through their unexpected bond, the miser gradually transforms.

results.title: Alive
results.overview: After coming face to face with death, 40-year-old Nora is consumed by an urgent need to feel alive. She dives into passionate relationships with two very different men, Tom and Max, whose opposing natures reflect her own inner conflict. But when neither can fill the void, Nora is forced to face the truth, she will have to confront a deeper fear driving her hunger for life.

results.title: Rodeo Dreams
results.overview: Six young Australian bull-riders travel to North West Queensland to compete for a spot in the Mount Isa Mines Rodeo; the largest and richest rodeo in the southern hemisphere.

results.title: Ruins
results.overview: RUINS follows the filmmaker’s return to North Macedonia, where she sets out to restore a modernist monument by her late father. Once conceived as a symbol of collective freedom, the memorial site is now left to decay in a changing political and social landscape. As she navigates the practical and institutional challenges of its reconstruction, the process becomes intertwined with her own experience of loss, marked by the absence of three close family members. Through archival materials, individual recollections, and the monument's present-day reality, the film explores how personal grief connects to the quiet fading of a once shared idealism that defined an era. What begins as an effort to preserve a legacy gradually becomes a reflection on what can or cannot be restored and on how presence endures beyond loss.

results.title: Superbuhei
results.overview: Jesse Bronske runs the melancholy bar Klaus Meine, navigating love, work, and paranoia while haunted by his twin, as daily life and risky plans spiral amid alcohol and obsession.

results.title: Magical Secret Tour
results.original_title: マジカル・シークレット・ツアー
results.overview: A mother of two who suddenly learns of her husband’s embezzlement and crushing debts; a researcher buried in debt; and an unmarried, pregnant woman with no savings. Three women who seem to have nothing to do with crime cross paths by chance and, through gold smuggling, form an unexpected bond as partners in crime. As they seize money and freedom, a revenge game begins—one that allows each of them to reclaim and rebuild their lives. The sight of women who have long gone with the flow of life, choosing to take their fate into their own hands even if it means crossing the line into crime, shines with a dazzling intensity.

results.title: The Gift
results.overview: An elderly farmer befriends a woman whose family believe is possessed.

results.title: Lakshmikanthan Kolai Vazhakku
results.overview: A young man convicted of murder awaits execution, while a conflicted judge, an aging hangman, and a morally torn jailer confront the weight of justice, guilt, and humanity in the final hours before dawn.

results.title: D’un monde à l’autre
results.overview: From One World to Another is an intimate documentary, a human and sensory journey through grief and friendship. After the accidental death of his best friend, actor Jérémie Renier begins a journey of contemplation thanks to the encounter with a French explorer, Loury Lag, who travels through uninhabited territories in extreme conditions. They will set off together across the Arctic ice floes. Left to their own devices, the two men will test each other, until they become alive again. An initiatory quest, which explores the territories of life, where the hostility of the world refers to death.

results.title: Magshimim High
results.overview: A cinematic rock opera and an homage to teen films, adapted from the stage musical with the same name by Amit Ulman, scripted completely in Hebrew rhymes. Yoav, a teenage boy who lives with his single mother, who struggles to finance them, moves to a new city. He joins Magshimim High, where words hit harder than punches, and your rhyming skills determine the food chain. After the "class king" demolishes him in a rap battle, Yoav is determined to prove himself and win the heart of the "class queen", Maya. He encounters Hamorabi, a legendary former rapper who hides under the image of the school's kiosk cashier. With his help, Yoav turns from an outcast to the Star of the Battles. But as he climbs high, he draws apart from the friends who stood by his side, the girl who really saw him when no one else had, and the authenticity taught to him by Hamorabi. In the National Rap Championship, Yoav will have to choose between chasing the shining lights of fame or staying true to himself.

results.title: On the Edge
results.overview: Alexia, 25, arrives as a trainee nurse in the closed ward of a psychiatric hospital, and meets Joëlle, the head nurse, who teaches her the job. Alexia is touched by the anger of Mila, a 20-year-old patient, who thinks she has no business being there. Despite Joëlle’s warnings about keeping her distance from patients, Alexia gets close to Mila and puts all her energy into trying to get her out.

results.title: Living Corpse
results.overview: Yosuke Shinkai is haunted by a past he cannot recall - and a body that is rapidly decomposing. He is a living corpse, unclear who he is or why he has been brought back to life only to suffer again a slow gruesome death. Based on the 1986 horror manga by Hideshi Hino.

results.title: Summer School, 2001
results.overview: A teenage boy returns to his family after years apart, scarred from being sent to Vietnam while his younger brother stayed in Czechia. After reunion, he faces a distant father, a mother desperate to mend the past, and a brother uneasy about sharing the spotlight. One chaotic summer pushes them to their limits when the younger brother falls from a roof. Between misunderstandings and clumsy family dynamics, they learn that sometimes, healing begins by letting the cracks show.

results.title: The Romance of the Western Chamber
results.overview: Zhang Junrui and Cui Yingying fall passionately in love, but after he saves her family, Madame Cui breaks her pledge to wed them, leaving Yingying torn between desire and duty.

results.title: Echo of Tomorrow's War
results.overview: The EU has fallen apart, and in Germany, far-right populists are forming a new government. War is imminent. Jonas has deserted; he and his sister go into hiding at the home of their father, Stuber, whom Jonas has not seen since childhood. But there, the situation escalates. A catastrophe occurs even before the war has begun.

results.title: Schrödinger's Man
results.overview: In the midst of an existential crisis, Y. ostracizes himself to live the rest of his days in  solitude - locked in an underground bunker, with a system designed to euthanize him at a  random time.  Both dead and alive, his fragile peace is shattered by a series of apparitions.

results.title: The Styx
results.overview: In search of absolution, a grieving man descends into a nightmarish inferno of guilt, fear, and judgment

results.title: Our Effed Up World
results.overview: Sheri thought her biggest problem in life was dealing with the recent loss of her beloved grandma.  But when a mysterious entity crash lands in the woods, only she and her group of shitkicker friends are what stands in the way of an insatiable, intergalactic hunger.

results.title: If You had Stayed
results.overview: After a tragic choice leads him to the brink, a disillusioned artist named Michael awakens on a mysterious beach. a liminal space where lost souls come to confront their pasts. Guided by Bob, a charismatic yet enigmatic caretaker, Michael embarks on a surreal journey through the pivotal moments of his life: love, heartbreak, and devastating loss. As he confronts hidden truths and unspoken regrets, Michael is faced with one profound question: Was it worth it, and what would life be like if he had stayed?

results.title: Eye in the Sky
results.overview: Set on New Year’s Eve. Elizabeth, an overworked intern at a long-forgotten government black site receives an other-worldly signal. It’s up to her, a cowardly general, the site’s near bankrupt financier and a plucky yet mysterious receptionist to respond. However, not everything goes to plan after ulterior motives are revealed and tension quickly rises.

results.title: Coo Coo Quark Quark
results.overview: A group of young people born in or after 1995 from Hangzhou set out on a quest for a cherished item they lost in their childhood, a journey that unexpectedly changed their lives in the process.

results.title: The Withering
results.overview: After an elderly woman discovers a mysterious amulet that restores her youth by draining the life from those around her, her caregiver must stop her as an entire town withers in a grotesque battle over renewal and the terror of aging.

results.title: Flesh Fruit
results.overview: A farmer manages to save his livelihood by selling a new fruit product whose origins are best kept a secret between him and his domineering mother.

results.title: Unchained
results.overview: Nishi, a former delinquent and an ex-convict, runs a countryside rehabilitation facility for juvenile delinquents where they grow vegetables and do community work. Kaito, a junior high school delinquent who hangs out with criminals, is sent to Nishi's facility after vandalizing his school. Nishi tries his best to straighten out Kaito, but his old-fashioned and violent methods eventually cause his troubled past to get media attention.

results.title: The Activist
results.overview: A young man infiltrates a radical neo-Nazi group to find the killer of his LGBT+ activist boyfriend.

results.title: Afterblue
results.overview: A boy wakes up confused in an enchanting forest, when a butterfly calms him and guides him through the woods to an ethereal garden, where he encounters a mysterious carp that takes him on an astral journey of liberation.

results.title: Julie Takes a Walk
results.overview: When Julie shows up disheveled to a dive bar in the middle of nowhere, her connection with the bartender is a nice surprise.

results.title: The Columbus Coroner
results.overview: In an effort to go viral, a struggling true crime YouTuber decides to hunt down an infamous serial killer.

results.title: Abhhiman
results.overview: A complex relationship drama.

results.title: Flying Colors
results.overview: Belén, a 17-year-old who uses a wheelchair, feels she is being left behind as her friends plan their futures outside of school. Her rebelliousness leads her to an adapted athletics club, where she meets Laura, a Paralympic athlete who inspires her to reconnect with her body and confidence. Belén will discover that growing up is not about following the path of others, but about building her own, even if in a different way.

results.title: Flywire
results.overview: Late in the night, while the world sleeps, a subterranean swamp craft rushes beneath the reeds in this animated short.

results.title: Skin One Size Smaller
results.overview: Nikola has a dysfunctional relationship with his father, who wants the power to control his life.

results.title: Retrospective
results.overview: A behind-the-scenes look at the show of the Collectible Pieces collection by Ural fashion house Ushatava at the Garage Museum.

results.title: The Social Distance
results.overview: In an attempt to make the most of their limited fun during the summer of the  Covid-19 lockdown, a science nerd and her boy-crazy best friend decide to build  a spaceship to escape the quarantine before the summer ends and they start at  different highschools, but as the lift-off draws near, they find that building a  rocket may prove easier than maintaining their friendship.

results.title: Europe's Forgotten Giants
results.overview: A story about Europe´s largest terrestrial mammal and their potential return to Swedish forests. The audience also meets Rikard, the main caretaker of Avesta Visentpark and who shares his inner reflections and hopes regarding the future of the European bison.

results.title: What Does This Mean?
results.overview: Sal and Mike explore an art museum and figure out what "art" means to them.

results.title: First Light
results.overview: An elderly nun witnesses a young construction worker's fatal accident, compelling her to question the ethical principles of the institution she has devoted her life to.

results.title: Three Men for Vilma
results.overview: 35-year-old teacher Vilma Veierød lives alone. She shuns social media and worries too much - most of all about death. One day in December, the handsome priest Ivar and the pathologist Robert with Tourette's suddenly appear on her doorstep with a letter and the news that her father has died. Vilma didn't even know she had a father, and the letter turns her whole life upside down. Vilma's life has not been full of people. Not by a long shot. But now she suddenly must deal with two men. Three - if you count her dead father.

results.title: August & Ebony
results.overview: Ebony, who finds herself unexpectedly pregnant after a U-Haul marriage, has to referee between her new wife, August and best friend-turned-child’s father, Justin, while finding her footing as a mother-to-be.

results.title: The Miserable Mother
results.overview: “For ‘The Miserable Mother’, stuck at home with her boyfriend, ‘Peter Pan’, and their newborn, motherhood becomes a prison. Within her own four walls, the boundaries blur between inside and outside, society and subject, body and discourse. A musical film.

results.title: Divinorum
results.overview: Paul returns to his workplace after being admitted to a rehabilitation clinic.

results.title: Buffalo Spirit
results.overview: Fleeing from a troubled home life, a young Blackfeet woman finds refuge on the buffalo ranch of her Auntie and, in learning to care for the buffalo, begins to heal from the wounds that led her there.

results.title: Pause
results.overview: While helping her grandmother with paperwork, a withdrawn young woman spends the day waiting among strangers in a municipal office, where passing encounters quietly begin to unsettle her isolation.

results.title: How to Feed a Dictator
results.overview: Five private chefs to fearsome dictators all over the world share their experiences of the kitchens and circumstances that led them to these sometimes dangerous and often morally compromising workplaces.

results.title: Sand i Tissen
results.overview: A mother and her daughter spend a day naked at the beach, discovering each other's intimate secrets.

results.title: Valencia - Chapter I
results.overview: One December night, Alice works as a babysitter while the baby's parents go out for the night. As time passes and the night deepens, she begins to receive chilling threats from a man who seems to be watching her from every blind spot in the darkness.

results.title: About The Mother
results.overview: Sibel's husband is hospitalized with liver failure and is waiting for an organ transplant. Due to the urgency of the situation and the low probability of his turn, Sibel begins searching for an organ donor on her own.

results.title: The Sound of the Jaguar
results.overview: Irma, a woman originally from an indigenous region in Mexico, migrates to the city. As she navigates the streets of this new environment, she engages in a dialogue with herself. With each word, memories of a past life in which Irma was a jaguar roaming the vast Chinantec region start to emerge.

results.title: The Film About Edith
results.overview: The day she starts speaking Swedish, 28-year-old Norwegian Edith also dreams herself into the center of a movie. But it turns out that changing languages isn’t enough to make her the main character.

results.title: Gregor
results.overview: The discovery of a human skull fragment plunges Gregor into a hallucinatory thriller blending violence, power, and extreme fantasies...

results.title: Guggi
results.overview: An intimate portrait of abstract painter Guggi that traces his journey from humble Irish beginnings—with friends Bono and Gavin Friday—through his post-punk phase and toward international acclaim as an uncompromising artist.

results.title: Shana
results.overview: Shana navigates the trials and tribulations of everyday life with boundless energy and the support of her group of friends. When her grandmother passes away, she inherits a ring that is supposed to protect her from bad luck. Shana certainly needs this helping hand. Especially since her toxic partner has been released from prison, and misfortunes are piling up…

results.title: Agatha Didn't Kill Her Psychiatrist
results.overview: In a therapy session, secrets emerge, turning the encounter between Ágatha and her psychiatrist into a dangerous psychological game.

results.title: TNA Slammiversary 2026
results.overview: The 2026 Slammiversary is an upcoming professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) event produced by Total Nonstop Action Wrestling (TNA). It will take place on June 28, 2026, at the Agganis Arena in Boston, Massachusetts. It will be the 22nd event under the Slammiversary chronology, and will celebrate the promotion's 24th anniversary.

results.title: Meet Me in the Margins
results.overview: A book editor secretly pens her own romance manuscript, only to find unexpected editorial notes from a mysterious critic in the margins. The film is a witty, heartwarming story about finding love between the lines.

results.title: Return to Your Dreams
results.overview: Waking up from a dream he can’t seem to forget, Faizan struggles to maintain the newly structured life he’s built for himself, dazed and lost in thought. And as more memories from his past continue to resurface, he soon learns that the nightmarish ones still refuse to let him go.

results.title: MOUTH FULL OF GOLDS
results.overview: This is the definitive documentary of grillz (gold teeth) as told through the life and times of the artforms creator Famous Eddie Plein - one of the most inventive fashion icon you’ve never heard of, an entrepreneur who changed the face of hip-hop, one gold tooth at a time.  Simultaneously developing the aesthetic of grillz as the sound of hip-hop evolved across the country giving each city their moment in the spotlight. The story of a man who found him self at the epicentre of the hip-hop, Miami bass, Southern Rap and Chopped and Screwed music scenes.  A natural born hustler whose customer base comprised of rap superstars, millionaire drug dealers, gangsters and fashion focused teenagers. An icon that built and then lost an empire after the world went digital and moved on-line without him.

results.title: Should to Shoulder
results.overview: A foreign writer is in Sicily and believes that careful observation is enough to understand Sicilian culture and Sicilians. However, through his stories, he learns that you cannot know or understand Sicily or Sicilians through mere observation. You have to stand beside its people, shoulder to shoulder (Spalla a Spadda), share their struggles and their victories. Only then can you begin to understand

results.title: So Happy It Hurts
results.overview: Lena wants to be famous at last. Since her acting career isn't exactly taking off, the reality show "Dream Weddings" is her only hope. She even flies all the way to Bali to marry her boyfriend David in style. But then reality sets in: the wedding venue they booked is a scam. Instead of luxurious surroundings, they end up in a mysterious jungle commune where nothing is as it seems.

results.title: Hangar
results.overview: A group of homosexual men lick, stamp, and dispatch their erotic fantasies through a surreal postal service in an intensely experimental film. Shot on Super 8, the piece unfolds as a rhythmic whirlwind in which desire circulates as physical matter.

results.title: Wonderland
results.overview: Wonderland follows Luke, a York tour guide struggling with creative burnout. Before he can leave the city for good, he has to give one last tour, only to discover it’s been booked by his estranged brother Ellis. As the tour continues, the lies that sit between them are exposed.

results.title: Traveling Alone
results.overview: Misaki, who has worked in Tokyo for ten years, spends quality time with her family and friends again in her hometown. At an event where classmates gather, she learns that the boy she liked in middle school has died.

results.title: Entroncamento
results.overview: In the town of Entroncamento, violence, misfortune, greed, and loyalty rule the streets. Laura arrives there to rebuild her life, but the irresistible pull of quick money and crime immediately draws her back into a troubled past. For those she meets at this crossroads, every day presents the choice between who they were and who they might become.

results.title: Kill your Darlings
results.overview: Alan is presented with a unique opportunity by a mysterious woman. But what seems to be a satisfaction of his darkest desires escalates in a way he couldn’t have seen coming…

results.title: Batik, Beats & Bumbu
results.overview: A film about third-generation artists with Indonesian roots who embrace their cultural heritage in their work.  Director Claire Pijman portrays Nusantara Beat, the popular band that sings in Bahasa Indonesia and Sundanese. Vanja van der Leeden, a culinary artist who looks beyond the ‘rijsttafel’. Myrthe Groot & Romee Mulder of fashion atelier Guave, who design clothing made from batik. And Sekan, DJ / photographer / founder of record label Jiwa2, who is putting Indonesian pop music from the ’70s and ’80s back on the map. All artists collaborate with artists from Indonesia, allowing the viewer to also be taken into present-day Indonesia.

results.title: Stolen Memories
results.overview: 18-year old Emil's night takes a dark turn when a break-in reveals old photographs of Emil and his mother in a bathtub, making him question his past.

results.title: No Volveré
results.overview: A lonely ventriloquist is served divorce papers at the showroom bar where he works. Things take a strange turn when he tries to remedy the situation with his puppet, Luis.

results.title: No Hard Feelings
results.overview: Down-on-his-luck ride-hailing driver Li Song eases his frustrations via an obscure podcast, held back from new romance by an embarrassing chronic ailment. Yin, pretending to be a Korean customer service agent at a health-supplement firm, drudges through client calls to save for an apartment. A follow-up phone call draws these two lonely urban strangers together behind lies. As reality and delusion crumble, they are forced to confront life and their true selves.

results.title: Ensaio Geral Para Um Futuro Ausente
results.original_title: Ensaio Geral Para Um Futuro Ausente

results.title: Presenting: The End of the World
results.original_title: Presenting: The End of the World
results.overview: During a self-taped audition for a film about the apocalypse, 15-year-old Tyler realizes that the end might not be fiction after all.

results.title: Распаковка
results.overview: Popular blogger Vlad tries to attract attention to his concert in an original way - he puts himself up for auction. The lot immediately goes to the son of a rich businessman. Now Vlad is obliged to entertain Borya for a whole week. All attempts to break the contract run into huge fines, and then Vlad decides to really piss off Borya and make a video blog out of his life. In response, Borya arranges more and more new challenges for him.

results.title: Makeshift Art Bar: Discipline
results.overview: In Benidorm, a Harry Styles tribute struggles to separate who he is from who he performs as every night.

results.title: We, the Hated
results.overview: An intimate portrait of Just Stop Oil protestors asks what it really costs to take a stand in a supposedly democratic society.

results.title: Memorizu
results.overview: After his father-in-law Makoto fractures his leg, young professional Yuta travels from his home in Tokyo to a rural town in Kyushu to take care of the older man and help out in his old-fashioned photo studio.

results.title: Rotten Apples
results.overview: When Eddie, a successful but insecure actor, is saddled with his Alzheimer's-stricken father after he’s kicked out of Rotten Apples, a nursing home for emotionally inept old men, he must figure out the fastest way to get rid of him—in time for his life-changing Zoom audition with Darren Aronofsky, a role which could finally get him the Award he has always dreamed of.

results.title: Identity
results.overview: A teenage boy struggling to stay true to his values while being pulled toward the need for acceptance reaches a breaking point, leading to a life-changing supernatural encounter that finally gives him the peace he has been looking for.

results.title: Static Windows
results.overview: At 3:13 AM, a lonely insurance worker notices a pale figure standing outside his window, quietly filming him in the dark. Night after night he searches for answers, but the closer he gets to the truth, the less it seems to make sense. Soon the line between watcher and watched begins to dissolve.

results.title: Amadeo and the Hypothetical New World
results.original_title: Amadeo and the Hypothetical New World

results.title: Duwid Tuminkiz - Makunaima é Duwid?
results.overview: Is Makunaima Duwid? A question, a process, a film, and a living memory of the Wapichana people. The film proposes a journey into traditional Wapichana narratives from the territory of Serra da Lua, in Roraima. The script invites the audience to reflect on the famous character Macunaíma, created by Mário de Andrade — who will mark its 100th anniversary in 2028 — and its connections to its Indigenous roots, especially those of the Wapichana people.

results.title: The Mountain
results.overview: The story begins when Kazuno receives a letter from an old friend. The letter says that ever since a group of them tested their courage at an abandoned ruin, a series of strange and disturbing events has begun to occur. Half out of curiosity as part of her research, Kazuno visits the people involved. However, what awaits her is only the beginning of days filled with terror that will eventually consume her as well. One of them dies under mysterious circumstances, and the remaining survivors gradually begin to lose their sanity.

results.title: The Longest Wait
results.overview: The first feature-length documentary on the journey of the Indonesian National Team.

results.title: Method Cowboy
results.overview: When a struggling actor feigns being gay to land the role of a lifetime in an Oscar-bait Cowboy Western, he decides to transform himself for the role, blurring the lines between reality and performance.

results.title: Luwalhati
results.overview: In a small and judgmental town, a teenage girl forms a deep connection  with a pregnant young woman who is looked down on, leading her to question her beliefs,  her family, and her desire to be free.

results.title: In Case You Forget
results.overview: Devoted son Tom struggles to care for his elderly mother Mary, whilst battling his own mental health issues. When Mary goes missing, Tom's grip on reality begins to crack.

results.title: In illo αTempore
results.overview: 19th part (R. 19 bis) of interdisciplinary cycle REQUIEM. "I imagine that almost everyone who has come across this piece is familiar with the phrase 'in illo tempore'. In illo tempore—in that time. [...] Let’s pause for a moment on 'tempore'. Let’s consider, as laypeople might, what part of the original phrase this is. Of course, it is technically 'time.' [..] When an extra letter 'a' appeared in my mind—which has a tendency to complicate all sorts of concepts to the limit—it completely changed the perspective of everything. 'aTempore' was born. What did that mean to me? If 'tempore' is, theoretically, '(at) that time,' then 'aTempore' would mean 'non-time.' Now we have 'That Non-Time.' Does this mean we should think of time that has stopped? Or perhaps of different spaces, sensations? [...]" - as the introductionary note to the movie says.

results.title: The Intimacy Coordinator
results.overview: Centered around an intimacy coordinator who also happens to be a sex addict.

results.title: Paroxysm
results.overview: After a drug deal goes horribly wrong, Celia is pulled into a surreal odyssey of self-discovery. Drifting through a distorted world, she encounters temptation, desire, and paranoia as her sense of self begins to unravel and the line between reality and fantasy begin to blur around her

results.title: XYZ
results.overview: An obsessive exploration of the three geometric dimensions in hopes of reaching a fourth.

results.title: Heart Set on Her
results.overview: Mia and Emma decide to take the next step toward marriage, only to find their first challenge lies in bringing their families together. Amid complicated traditions, dowry preparations, and the chaos of wedding planning, they face arguments, doubts, and uncertainty about the future. As expectations from both sides begin to weigh on them, they start to question what happiness truly means—and whether marriage is really the answer.

results.title: The Crucian
results.overview: Born never to cry, Fish seeks his missing mother through the underworld. He believes her ghost is imprisoned within a deity puppet — yet, it conceals neither his mother nor an informant, but a survivor. Through the puppet’s mouth, the seaside street’s buried past unfolds.

results.title: Something, Something, Seventh Street
results.overview: Brooke picks up a table on Facebook Marketplace and brings it home.

results.title: Lenin's Pawn
results.overview: LENIN’S PAWN is a hybrid documentary with dark humor following actor Sergiu Voloc, a modern-day Don Quixote whose lonely fight against Lenin monuments across Moldova turns into an absurd confrontation with a system that rebuilds them overnight.

results.title: Paradise Lost
results.overview: Three journeys from Belfast to Glasgow uncover how a football club’s disappearance reshaped a community. Through intimate character portraits, the film examines identity, memory, and belonging in the shadow of conflict.

results.title: Sizzler '77
results.overview: In the summer of 1977, a group of working girls are being coerced by a mysterious and sinister pimp Bossy Jim and his young partner Chaka, to become involved in a profit-share scheme.

results.title: The Cage
results.overview: A covert operative goes undercover as a henchman in a warehouse hiding a major drug operation. Out for revenge, he fights his way through the criminals inside, determined to take down the ruthless Baron responsible for his daughter’s life.

results.title: Donkey Days
results.overview: Sisters Anna and Charlotte have always fought for their mother’s attention. As old wounds reopen and suck them back to their family home, they unravel mesmerizing mysteries, including anonymous ashes and their mother’s love for a donkey. Will they come to terms with each other?

results.title: Breathe, Brother, Breathe
results.overview: An asthmatic Iranian-American high schooler learns the trumpet to keep a precious friendship intact, reconnect with his emotionally distant family, and take control of his fragmented life.

results.title: Viaje al país de los blancos
results.original_title: Viaje al país de los blancos

results.title: Chi Mangia Solo
results.overview: On the night before selling their childhood home, an estranged brother and sister reconnect while cooking their late mother’s favorite recipe. They find their grief simmering just beneath the surface.

results.title: Naxos
results.overview: On a research trip to Greece, Adam slips into a parallel life without marriage, children, or responsibility. With Nysa, a local, he drifts through enchanted freedom while haunted by the life he once took for granted.

results.title: Europiano (1/2) - The finest piano concertos from across Europe
results.original_title: Europiano (1/2) The finest piano concertos from across Europe
results.overview: To mark Music Day, ten European orchestras will perform some of the finest piano concertos alongside prestigious soloists and under the baton of renowned conductors from various cities across the continent. The programme for this exceptional concert features works by Brahms, Grieg, Chopin, Beethoven, Ravel and Mozart.

results.title: Maurice
results.overview: Having reached a breaking point, Maurice, a twenty-five-year-old delivery driver, decides to quit his job in the middle of his shift. After riding for hours on a scooter that eventually breaks down, he finds himself walking along a long highway. Along the way, his path crosses that of Amour, a cashier at a local gas station…

results.title: Silent Flood
results.overview: Set by a beautiful river canyon in Western Ukraine, a pacifist community with unique religious beliefs, sees their peaceful way of life gradually distressed by regular floods and eventually an unexpected war.

results.title: Stankface Standing Soldier: The Rise of Mato Wayuhi
results.original_title: Stankface Standing Soldier: The Rise of Mato Wayuhi
results.overview: As Mato Wayuhi continues to rise as a musical composer and rapper, he continues to hear his father’s and ancestors’ voices in his art. Mato is known for composing the score for the Emmy-nominated series Reservation Dogs. Outside of the realm of composing, Mato engages with his community and the world through his talents as a rapper. Stankface Standing Soldier: The Rise of Mato Wayuhi provides a glimpse into the up-and-coming Oglala Lakota artist’s life as a rising rapper and composer. With the release of his recent album, Stankface Standing Soldier, the audience receives a deeper look into Mato’s personal inspiration and upbringing. This documentary showcases Mato’s versatility as a performer, showcasing his creative path led by his ancestors and his father’s voice.

results.title: Iris Replica
results.overview: A Puzzle. Triplets are celebrating their birthday. Two are waiting for the return of the third. What they don't know is that the voice outside the door doesn't belong to their brother.

results.title: The Metropolitan Opera: El Último Sueño de Frida y Diego
results.original_title: The Metropolitan Opera: El Último Sueño de Frida y Diego
results.overview: American composer Gabriela Lena Frank’s first opera, a magical-realist portrait of Mexico’s painterly power couple Frida Kahlo and Diego Rivera, with libretto by Pulitzer Prize–winning playwright Nilo Cruz. Fashioned as a reversal of the Orpheus and Euridice myth, the story depicts Frida, sung by leading mezzo-soprano Isabel Leonard, leaving the underworld on the Day of the Dead and reuniting with Diego, portrayed by baritone Carlos Álvarez. The famously feuding pair briefly relive their tumultuous love, embracing both the passion and the pain before bidding the land of the living a final farewell. Music Director Yannick Nézet-Séguin conducts the Met-premiere staging of Frank’s opera, a “confident, richly imagined score” (The New Yorker) that “bursts with color and fresh individuality” (Los Angeles Times).

results.title: The Parking Spot
results.overview: From the philosophy lectern to the director’s chair, Louis Godbout draws on fifteen years of profound contemplation to depict an ordinary "battle": fighting over a parking space. It all begins with one parking spot, a couple and a stranger. Calling the police fails to end the conflict, which instead escalates into a silent psychological warfare. A single comment from the stranger acts like a domino effect, knocking down every seemingly solid pillar of the couple’s relationship. Undercurrents run rampant throughout the night.The film employs tranquil empty shots to create an oppressive, suffocating atmosphere, and its understated dialogue leaves vast room for the audience to interpret. When intimate bonds meet the game of human nature, who is the real stranger in the end?

results.title: Hong Kong Heels - 港出我天后
results.overview: Pan lives two lives. During the day he is the son of a traditional Hong Kong family. But at night he transforms into the unapologetic drag queen Pansze Diva entertaining the underground of the city.  Ultimately looking for acceptance by their parents, what does a death in the family change?

results.title: To Live and Die in AlHamadaniyyah
results.overview: And a father sets out to inspect a new house in alhamadaniyyah. What follows drifts into his son's inner world where absence , ,unease , and unanswered questions beginning to take shape. Something about the decision doesn't sit right but no one sees it

results.title: Because of you Ka Kui
results.overview: A documentary feature celebrating the music, life, and artistic pursuit of Canto rock music legend Wong Ka Kui, whose voice and vision defined the sound of Beyond- the most influential Canto rock band of all time. Featuring rare concert footage, never-before-seen archives of Ka Kui's early years, and unreleased work, this documentary offers an intimate portrait of Wong Ka Kui- not through nostalgia, not as a distant legend, but as he truly was. At its heart is the precious legacy of his character and convictions—one that continues to transcend generations, his music still lifting spirits and inspiring hope today.

results.title: Midnight Knocks at the Door
results.overview: Stripped of color and clothes, ready to be cleansed. A young man's midnight bath becomes a surreal nightmare the moment he realizes he is not alone.

results.title: The Archivist
results.overview: David "Doc" Rowe has spent decades documenting Britain's vibrant folk traditions. Now, with time running short, he faces a race to preserve his legacy.

results.title: Dukun Magang
results.overview: Raka is a final-year student frustrated by the constant rejection of his thesis by his lecturers. Sekar, his college friend, suggests that his thesis explore the world of shamanism. Meanwhile, Mbah Djambrong is a legendary and eccentric shaman from Kalimati, a remote village renowned for its supernatural traditions, holding mysteries about humanity's relationship with the mystical and spiritual world.

results.title: The seed of tomorrow
results.overview: In a polluted world, one kid will find a way to change things for the better.

results.title: The Vanishing Tour
results.overview: When a struggling band is carjacked and stranded in the desert, they seek shelter at a mysterious compound that houses a dangerous secret.

results.title: My Name Is Rafaela
results.overview: Rafaela, a 19-year-old transgender girl, finds herself torn between two identities: Rafaela, the woman she sees herself as, and Daniel, the man those around her perceive her as. While navigating her college life and engaging with friends and a romantic interest, this dissonance generates increasing internal confusion, leading her to question who she truly is and how she wants to be percieved.

results.title: Mr Adidos
results.overview: In search of a perfect vintage sweater, a lonely artist is drawn into the chaotic orbit of two thrift-shopping twins, leading brand-label-status, shame and longing to collide in an unexpectedly tender and surreal encounter.

results.title: Blood Yolk
results.overview: After returning to her family’s decaying farm, an estranged writer confronts a dark secret that forces her to question her twin brother’s involvement in a string of murders — and her own capacity to kill.

results.title: The Smile Everyone Loved
results.overview: Sometimes it's hard to be someone who everyone loves.

results.title: American Heena
results.overview: As part of his wedding plans, Dudu needs to go back to Israel from America for a ritual Hina ceremony with his fiance's American family.

results.title: Delay 1/2-4
results.overview: A story about a man and a camera.

results.title: ELEFANTE
results.overview: Maria reunites with her friend Eliza after a long time, however, the discomfort and tension between them quickly grow when the topic of Eliza's pregnancy comes up.

results.title: To dream it first
results.overview: Mikkel and Mathilde are complete opposites, and share nothing except math class on Fridays. But when Mathilde dreams, she encounters a whole new side of Mikkel - who turns out to be dreaming the same dream. Can this meeting change everything?

results.title: The Producer
results.overview: Tom, a young ambitious producer starts spiralling three years into his career when he begins hearing voices and seeing himself in ways that frighten him.

results.title: The Whale and the Musician
results.overview: An electronic composer sets out to sea, where his music evokes a deep, poetic resonance in a humpback whale. Can we communicate with animals through music?

results.title: Travis Barker: Louder Than Fear
results.overview: The documentary film follows the musician as he embarks on a raw and redemptive journey, which started after surviving a devastating plane crash that nearly took his life.

results.title: Pigeon Religion
results.overview: Descend into the world of New York City’s pigeon people and see how this community reshapes our understanding of the city’s most ubiquitous bird.

results.title: They Slay
results.overview: Longtime friends Raemee, Maggie and Lee come together for an annual Halloween hang-out at Lee’s house. Things are different this year when Maggie's new partner, Sam, and Lee’s younger sibling, Charlie, join the group. When they reignite their tradition of playing with a spirit board, they accidentally invite a supernatural being to join in the party. Uncomfortable truths rise to the surface and things take a dark turn, calling into question if the friendships will survive the night- or if the friends will survive at all.

results.title: Under the Same Sun
results.overview: 1819. A young Spanish heir, a Chinese weaver, and a Haitian deserter struggle to find their place and humanity in the tense cultural crossroads of the colonial Caribbean. They embark on the ambitious endeavor of establishing a silk factory in the very heart of the island of Hispaniola.

results.title: The Welcome Table
results.overview: Tells the story of climate refugees across six continents, celebrating the voices and experiences of people living at the forefront of the climate crisis, displaced from their homes by climate disasters.

results.title: If Only You Knew
results.overview: After losing someone dear to her, fem finds the courage to confront her Jamaican father about his absences. A conversation that leads to an unspoken truth.

results.title: Between Us
results.overview: Between Us follows the multilayered stories of LGBTQIA+ Khmer and Vietnamese cultural workers in southern California as they contemplate the in-betweenness of belonging, healing, and carving out spaces of their own.

results.title: Amadeo e o hipotético mundo novo
results.original_title: Amadeo e o hipotético mundo novo

results.title: Tristán y los días por venir
results.original_title: Tristán y los días por venir
results.overview: Tristan experiences an exceptional adolescence: he goes through his gender transition supported by his mother, Virginia, his friends, his school, and the state, while trying to discover his passion for drawing. But when the pressures of adulthood arise and a shift in political orientation threatens his rights, he faces a question: is it possible to be trans without suffering so much?

results.title: Chronically Yours
results.overview: Chronically Yours follows Aubrey, a 27-year-old living with Multiple Sclerosis and how that affects her dating life.

results.title: Remember Death
results.overview: After a terminal diagnosis, Charlie realises that her time is near, leaving her with only a few weeks left to live. But she soon realises that death isn't unseen like she thinks.

results.title: No Contest
results.overview: When Victoire, a young trans judoka, reaches the final of a regional competition, her opponent, Sonia, refuses to compete against her.

results.title: RUNTME
results.overview: Cybersecurity lead Jordan Miller discovered something at work that he can't ignore, armed with a stolen USB drive, can he put things right before it's too late?

results.title: Table Read
results.overview: Professor J announces a casting for his new work. Fiona, a student from Hong Kong, is unexpectedly chosen as the female lead. During a staged family dinner, an abrupt performance, an uncooperative co-actor, and unaware spectators blur fiction and reality, leading her to uncover the script’s hidden subtext.

results.title: Polymer
results.overview: A cuck smokes a cigarette backwards while a failed rapper reminisces on his downfall. They come to realize a startling existential truth.

results.title: The Little Ring
results.overview: This film is adapted from a true story set in the Tibetan-inhabited areas and centers on the emotional entanglements of urban art practitioners. It follows a suspicious-minded male protagonist who drifts apart from his girlfriend over conflicts surrounding their artistic careers, forcing him to put his marriage proposal on hold indefinitely. After the pair travels to the Tibetan regions together, their relationship crumbles completely, culminating in an unexpected ending.The production features numerous leading contemporary Chinese artists and inheritors of intangible cultural heritage from Tibetan areas, seamlessly merging avant-garde art with traditional indigenous culture. Through an intimate emotional narrative exploring the full spectrum of human nature, the movie draws on Eastern philosophical thinking to help viewers break free from worldly obsessions.

results.title: The Price of Mari Anne
results.overview: When a young woman drops dead on a walk home from a bar, three men must decide between reporting the body or fleeing the scene. Their choices unravel undesirable consequences.

results.title: Woody Guthrie and the Ghost of Tom Joad Today
results.original_title: Woody Guthrie and the Ghost of Tom Joad Today
results.overview: Narrated by Rosanne Cash and featuring music from Bruce Springsteen, this timely film connects the paths of two American icons—songwriter Woody Guthrie (who penned "This Land is Your Land") and novelist John Steinbeck (who wrote "The Grapes of Wrath")—as they forged a bond in a campaign to ease the suffering of migrants in California, and their legacy today.

results.title: Plumped
results.overview: An honest, direct-to-camera survey film in which women speak candidly about their experiences with lip filler.

results.title: Little Nightmares - Broken Promises
results.overview: Locked in an attic, a neglected little girl escapes into a miniature world full of promise, until she discovers its terrible secrets: behind every shadow lurks a monster.

results.title: ave HRUBÁ
results.overview: Poet, performer, and local legend Eva Hrubá is a woman of contradictions, sparking both devotion and public outcry. This documentary dives into her dual existence of vibrant joy and silent suffering. Moving beyond her reputation as the  "eccentric lady on a purple bike," the film explores how she transforms loneliness into art and pain into a shared celebration of life. The film explores the world of a remarkable woman, seeking the boundary between her persona as an author and her performance.

results.title: The Wicker Children
results.overview: Undercover cop investigates disappearance of mother tied to cult, unraveling dark pagan rituals involving her strange children at secluded country house.

results.title: Le isole non si sentono mai sole
results.original_title: Le isole non si sentono mai sole
results.overview: The island of Bácan, in the Venice Lagoon, is a strip of land that once emerged only in the summer.  Human intervention, particularly the excavation work for the MOSE dam has altered the lagoon’s water balance, making the island a permanent feature.  Through a narration that gives voice to the island itself, the film reflects on its changing nature and on the connection between humans, water, and the landscape.

results.title: When the world was staring at me
results.original_title: Quand le monde me regardait trop fort
results.overview: Noa, a 23 years old woman, has to find a fake partner for a fancy-dress party tonight.

results.title: The old Lady and the Eternity
results.overview: Josefa Centeno, an 86-year-old woman, refuses to be uploaded to a digital afterlife, facing the consequences of defying the authoritarian regime. Built around archival footage, the director re-imagines his grandmother's life as a sci-fi fable about love, resistance and what it means to choose your own ending.

results.title: Clay
results.overview: Emerging from a plaster egg in Central Park, a baby embarks on a lyrical voyage through the city’s pulse, uncovering her true form.

results.title: Into the Darkness: The New Adventure
results.original_title: Into the Darkness: The New Adventure
results.overview: Captain Jerico and the crew of his starship go on a mission to find his missing Uncle. On this adventure, they encounter some aliens with strange customs and learn some important lessons about tolerance.

results.title: Checkmate
results.overview: A young man in debt, encounters a psychotic serial killer hell bent on eliminating the weak from today’s society.

results.title: He Brings the News (Il apporte la nouvelle)
results.original_title: He Brings the News (Il apporte la nouvelle)
results.overview: An isolated couple with too much time on their hands develops an unhealthy fascination with their mailman. Violence and absurdity follow as they descend into a world of phantasmagoric delusion.

results.title: Freefall: A Reckoning for Boeing
results.overview: Following the highly publicized death of Boeing whistleblower John Barnett, the investigation continues into the once-iconic aviation giant, uncovering startling new revelations and insider accounts in the wake of a deepening corporate crisis..

results.title: Stutterbug
results.overview: A stuttering man's desperate attempts to conceal his disability lead him to insult sick children, ruin his shot with his college crush and unwittingly hate-crime her also-stammering brother. All while just trying to order a cup of coffee.

results.title: Conflict
results.overview: Returning to his old neighborhood before its demolition, Ahmed revisits  memories. As he wanders its streets, he recalls something that forever  changed the way he sees the place he once called home

results.title: Daughters of the Late Colonel
results.overview: After the death of their ill-tempered and controlling father, two middle-aged sisters find themselves at a loss.  An unexpected visitor sparks the courage in them to begin their lives anew.. ‘Daughters of the Late Colonel’ is a merry, rude, and lyrical, animated adaptation of the modernist short story of the same name, written by Katherine Mansfield in 1920.

results.title: Fires Of Katherine
results.overview: As she deals with the consequences of a near-death experience, Katherine finds herself stuck in limbo, piecing together her past lives while dealing with loneliness, isolation and trauma, finding solace in unusual places

results.title: Our Bodies & Other Shames
results.overview: When one of them is diagnosed with breast cancer, three childhood friends gather for a sleepover in the Brooklyn of their youth. There, they are confronted by their younger selves for an endless night of memories, secrets, and girlhood.

results.title: Poop On My Lawn
results.overview: A young woman becomes obsessed with finding the culprit of the dog poop on her lawn as a way to avoid confronting the realities of her sick sister.

results.title: Farm to Fashion
results.overview: From upstate NY farms to Manhattan runways, Isabella Rossellini, Donna Karan, and Mimi Prober explore a shifting fashion system, reconnecting land, craft, and clothing in an era of overconsumption.

results.title: How You See Me
results.overview: In an effort to reconnect with her grandfather, a young woman travels to northeast Poland to trace his ancestry.

results.title: Sugar
results.overview: Oscar, a young sex worker, spends the night with an older client who introduces him to GHB and promises care. As the drug takes hold, reality fractures and past and present collide — until the night turns dangerous.

results.title: The Waddles
results.overview: A photo plunges Joy into despair. Max convinces her to join him in getting a cosmetic procedure and then hiding away in Palm Springs over the holidays to convalesce. But their friendship changes.

results.title: Car Crashes
results.overview: A Tinder date over cheap pizza devolves into a shit show.

results.title: Life in Ukraine be like
results.overview: Oleg's painstaking search for freedom is interrupted by the sudden return of his ex-girlfriend back to Ukraine, calling into question Oleg's lifestyle in the context of the Russo-Ukrainian War.

results.title: The Cage
results.overview: Scotty, a struggling actor who faces constant rejection, receives a role in a short film, portraying a mentally troubled man. Scotty immerses himself in drastic preparation and isolation, and he finds himself losing his authenticity, slipping into different personalities, even when the cameras aren't rolling, unable to differentiate what his true reality is.

results.title: Learning to Eat Cake
results.overview: An outgoing young woman reframes a strange and coercive sexual encounter as a comical tale to her friends in order to make light of the violation.

results.title: Company Sports Day
results.overview: Sales Team 3 is made the scapegoat for the chairman's embezzlement scandal. The team leader attempts to reveal the truth, but the manipulation of evidence by a key executive pushes the entire team to the brink of collective dismissal.

results.title: You Can't Fly
results.overview: Follows Matt Lewis, aka Silverback Tarzan, as he comes to terms with being grounded following a near fatal hang-gliding accident. For someone with as much energy and “seize the day” drive as Tarzan, this isn’t easy, but, with the support of his loving partner Tara, Tarzan’s almost aggressive positivity wins through.

results.title: Fifth Mission
results.overview: A methodical hitman kills those he believes are beyond justice. When a detective whose brother he murdered begins to hunt him, the chase becomes personal, blurring the line between law, revenge, and morality, and asking how far justice can bend before it is justice no more?

results.title: IN VERTIGO - OG Keemo und Funkvater Frank
results.original_title: IN VERTIGO - OG Keemo und Funkvater Frank
results.overview: OG Keemo faces his demons: An intense documentary about music, mental health, fatherhood, and a new album.

results.title: This party is DEAD
results.overview: When responsible Alice, superficial Sofie, crazy Hanka, and insecure Roman head out to a Halloween party, they have no idea that a night of madness and chaos is about to begin. A chain of arguments, embarrassing moments, and bad decisions quickly spirals out of control, leading to absurd and wild situations involving zombies, police officers, and frustrated romantic comedy actors. On her mission to rescue her younger sister Kristýna, Alice discovers that the real danger lies not so much in the zombies as in mutual prejudices and poor role models.

results.title: Frank Takes a Break!
results.overview: After being released from prison, a young man is sent to track down his old friend while drifting through an existential journey that forces him to choose between his past and a chance to change.

results.title: Le jour porte conseil
results.overview: Every night, a young man forgets the woman he loves. Every morning, she owes him relearning their story. For one other day, they experience love as intense as ephemeral, until even written memories start to disappear, only remains then, a love that continues to exist, despite forgetness.

results.title: Talvez Amanhã.
results.overview: 2014. Davi turns 14 and experiences one of his last family birthday celebrations. 2022. Manuela prepares for a mission that will change her life, dealing with longing, nostalgia, and farewells.

results.title: Соседи в поместье лорда Голефорнака
results.overview: An adventure film about a group of friends who drank wine, made films, and recorded music at a dacha in the Moscow region.

results.title: Europiano (2/2)  - The finest piano concertos from across Europe
results.original_title: Europiano (2/2) Les plus beaux concertos pour piano à travers l’Europe
results.overview: In the second part of this magnificent concert celebrating music from across Europe, Lukas Sternath, Martha Argerich, Bruce Liu and Hayato Sumino perform the finest piano concertos by Beethoven, Schumann, Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

results.title: Runners
results.overview: Ben is sent on a delivery job for his father, when his brother Harry unexpectedly joins him. As suspicion grows and tension rises, only one question comes to mind: what’s in the boot?

results.title: Sofia
results.overview: A quick waxing session turns into a nightmare when a Brazilian gets a brazilian.

results.title: French Girls
results.overview: A young woman enters the uniquely absurd world of modelling in this Sydney microbudget marvel. The debut feature of Hyun Lee.  Mia is drifting through life working on construction sites when she’s scouted by a Sydney model agent. Suddenly, she’s making more money than ever while working less – something her boyfriend loves to point out. Mia quietly observes this strange new world of modelling with deep uncertainty. Is this really the life she wants? With one curious turn after another, she finds herself in trouble with the law.

results.title: Зоопарк
results.overview: *Zoo* is a film about what happens when a person takes responsibility for another living being. It is about the people who choose this work—once—and stay forever. About animals that fell victim to inhumane treatment but were saved within the zoo. And about how the world increasingly needs places like this—places where every life is priceless.

results.title: MGA MAGICAL 10 YEARS DOCUMENTARY FILM 〜THE ORIGIN〜
results.original_title: MGA MAGICAL 10 YEARS DOCUMENTARY FILM 〜THE ORIGIN〜

results.title: I am Jit Bahadur
results.overview: Jit Bahadur’s journey from a struggling dreamer to a celebrated actor reveals the harsh price of fame, as his relentless ambition gradually distances him from the very family that once supported him.

results.title: Time Machine Maidan
results.overview: In this haunting and visually inventive documentary, a spectral voice drifts through time and memory to trace the Maidan revolution and the roots of resistance in Ukraine.

results.title: The Goose That Laid the Golden Egg
results.original_title: The Goose That Laid the Golden Egg
results.overview: When a psychiatrist discovers that a medication for the treatment of acne is causing teenagers to kill themselves, the pharmaceutical company sets out on a campaign to destroy the source of the threat to their billion-dollar-a-year drug.

results.title: YURIE
results.overview: ​​Three years have passed since Joji Uehara lost his father and took over his eatery "Yurie". Despite Joji's impressive culinary skills, his business continues to dwindle. One day, Kim Joo-ri, who came from South Korea to learn Japanese cuisine, arrives at the restaurant by coincidence. Although they clash over their differing values, the two of them gradually become closer as they work together to revive the struggling business. Guided by Kim's charmingly unconventional approach to life, the people around her begin to break free from their rigid minds.

results.title: Operació iperita. La trama civil de la guerra química
results.original_title: Operació iperita. La trama civil de la guerra química

results.title: Cockroach
results.overview: A black transgender man plans to exchange sex for top surgery money with an older gay man until his night hook up turns into a hunt for a cockroach who inspires him to open his heart and conquer his fears.

results.title: When Grandma Becomes Grandpa
results.overview: After a sudden downpour in the park, caregiver Shelly accidentally wheels home the wrong person — only to find she has brought back a grumpy, uncommunicative grandpa instead of her client. As she scrambles to switch them back, the grandpa refuses to go home.

results.title: Groundskeeper
results.overview: It was supposed to be a fun weekend. A trip away for a close-knit friend group to celebrate the end of high school. But when their estranged former best friend shows up, unannounced, with her douche boyfriend in tow… plans change. Tensions rise, friendships are tested, and the whole weekend seems hopeless. As a last-ditch attempt to save the trip, the group revisits a game from their childhood, a game inspired by a local ghost story. What started out as a fun activity turns deadly as real life begins to mirror the actions of the game, leading the friends to question each other and their own judgement. After all, no one really believes in ghosts… right?

results.title: This House of Ours
results.overview: An elderly woman copes with the aftermath of her husband's death by locking herself up inside their family home and holding onto their daily rituals, all the while being pulled into different directions by the pressure from their children.

results.title: Bliss: Beyond the Edge of Time
results.overview: Six animation directors draw on the six lines of the I Ching to create distinct shorts rooted in Taiwanese vernacular culture. Blending tradition and futurity, faith and emotion, and science fiction with reality, these intersecting visions spiral toward a cold, fantastical romance in an animated void reminiscent of Black Mirror.

results.title: Night of the Vamp-Friars
results.overview: A group of friends in a punk rock band discover a hidden cemetery in the woods where they accidentally raise a group of undead Friars.

results.title: Palm
results.overview: In South Los Angeles, a palm tree caretaker faces the quiet unraveling of his work and identity.

results.title: Beneath The Same Sky
results.overview: A hiker goes to the Elora Gorge to reflect on the land around him.

results.title: A Deadline Movie
results.overview: A group of college students travel back in time to submit their late assignment

results.title: Desert Beneath the Ocean
results.overview: In his later years, the sculptor Lu Hengsheng returned to his hometown and held a desert sculpture exhibition. During this time, he recalled three behind-the-scenes stories closely tied to his artistic career. On the day his final piece was unveiled, Lu Hengsheng drove deep into the desert and mysteriously disappeared...

results.title: The Dance of A Soloist
results.overview: Li Ze-yang's journey in music was bumpy yet full of colors. His musical collection serves as a historic witness to ethnic communities. His relentless editorial commitment proved a quintessential scarcity in the history of Taiwanese music.

results.title: Ensemble Modern – Why We Play
results.overview: The film goes far beyond the concert stage and delves into the tension-filled space of rehearsals – where the sound is not yet fixed, but alive, fragile, and in the process of becoming. We experience a wealth of musical encounters in which a shared musical language begins to breathe. The focus is on works by influential composers such as Rebecca Saunders, Heiner Goebbels, and Mark Andre, alongside the vibrant voices of a younger generation, including Brigitta Muntendorf and Milica Djordjevic, in collaboration with conductors such as Vimbayi Kaziboni, Bas Wiegers, Ingo Metzmacher, and Enno Poppe. Each year, Ensemble Modern premieres around 70 works, continually venturing into uncharted sonic territories.

results.title: Telharmonium
results.overview: A generative film exploring the automation of culture through one of the earliest electronic instruments: the Telharmonium. As in much of Menick’s work, the film links the history of technology with contemporary anxieties about artificial intelligence and the mechanization of creative labor.

results.title: Tanah Sengketa
results.overview: Yuni, a research student, opens a free learning class for children in Kampung Degong. Raka, a local youth who supports her, provides some needed books for the children. Terror begins to haunt Yuni. Despite warnings, Yuni refuses to give up and seeks to uncover the truth behind the strangeness.

results.title: Meet Me at the Club: The Castro Country Club Story
results.original_title: Meet Me at the Club: The Castro Country Club Story
results.overview: On April 1, 1983 at the frightening start of the AIDS epidemic, gay businessman and restaurateur Steve Harris opened the doors to the Castro Country Club as a refuge where folks could gather and find community outside of the bars and clubs in the Castro. For 40 years, the CCC has saved thousands of lives from the grips of addiction and alcoholism from its humble perch on 18th Street, one block from Castro Street. Meet Me at the Club captures the history of early trans experiences, the role that the AIDS epidemic played in addiction and alcoholism, and the miraculous recoveries from hopeless states of mind and body in San Francisco. When 295 people die every day from overdoses, the story of how this beautiful community came together to survive and thrive, there's no more important time than now to tell this story.

results.title: A City in the Forest
results.overview: When a private police foundation in Atlanta tries to raze an urban forest to build the country’s largest police training facility, a diverse, decentralized, and intersectional movement defends the forest from what they call “Cop City.” A City in the Forest paints a collective portrait of the country’s most urgent social justice story, where a web of activists fight back against environmental racism, political corruption, police violence, and the criminalization of dissent.

results.title: Each Other
results.overview: Enemies at school. friends at home. Two brothers navigate childhood with and without each other.

results.title: Luiza's Desert
results.overview: Luiza, a shy, awkward 15 year-old girl from Rio, dreams of being an artist. Her life is just starting to make sense when Luiza's world falls apart when her mother suffers an acute schizophrenic episode. Determined to hold her family together, Luiza must find the strength to face fear, loneliness and discrimination as she takes over the household and her mother's care.

results.title: Thirdwheel
results.overview: Jess and Joey have grown up beside each other, from family problems to teenage drama- they have always been there for one another.  When a new boy enters their world, it disrupts their comfortable pattern. A once safe place for both girls turns into a jealous ridden and unstable relationship.  As each girl is tested- will they be able to trust themselves and live authentically.

results.title: The Piano Tuner
results.overview: On a rescue mission to save the piano, a passionate piano tuner meets a diverse mix of owners and their pianos – revealing their stories and relationship with the instrument.

results.title: GOAT Pandemonium Ge on all tempo
results.original_title: GOAT Pandemonium Ge on all tempo
results.overview: After his hit show "GOAT," Ge Pamungkas is back with fresh material — exploring love, marriage and the battle of the sexes in this comedy special.

results.title: Beyond Files
results.overview: Case files document encounters with alien forces and altered realities, uncovering a pattern beyond human understanding.

results.title: Holy Defiance
results.overview: Since 2024, on central squares in many towns and cities across Croatia, groups of primarily elderly and middle-aged men calling themselves 'The Knights of the Immaculate Heart of Mary', gather together in communal prayer and advocating for Christian values, the importance of the patriarchy and enforcing limitations of women's rights, treating these squares as their own personal battlefield, upon which women have no place. Through the documentations of the reactions of law enforcement officials, ordinary passerbys and the 'Knights' themselves, as well as the defiant pieces of multimedia artist Arijana Lekić, Holy Defiance creates a vivid, lively, energetic and varied portrait of women's rights in post-war Croatia.

results.title: Sumpa Kingdom
results.overview: Raised in inland China, the protagonist Yangqing Lamu meets Baima, a young local guide, during an accidental trip to the plateau. The two travel deep into pastoral grasslands, embarking on a spiritual exploration of marriage, life and death, and morality amid the conflicts between dreams and reality, tradition and individuality. In the end, she achieves a profound reconciliation with both her homeland and her inner self in the vast wilderness.

results.title: Rescued
results.overview: A homeless man finds the motivation to turn his life around after a stray dog saves his life and refuses to leave his side.

results.title: Drei Kameradinnen
results.overview: Hani, Kasih and Saya have shared a deep friendship since their youth. Now, after years, the three meet again. But no matter where they are, it becomes clear time and again that everyday racism affects their lives. Nonetheless, their friendship gives them strength. Until one dramatic night shakes everything up.

results.title: Best Friends
results.overview: Robert doesn’t wake, dress, or even shave without the help of his best friends, Ewa and Adam. He has outsourced his whole existence, delegating every practical and emotional detail of his life. As the day of a career-defining interview unfolds, subtle cracks begin to appear. Faced with a situation that demands independence, Robert starts to question not only his own abilities, but also how much of himself he has already surrendered.

results.title: Rescue
results.overview: As the full-scale war in Ukraine forces millions to flee, rescuers move in the opposite direction - toward destroyed villages, active shelling, and mined roads - to save animals left behind when humans are forced to escape.

results.title: Far Far Away From LA
results.overview: Katie, from the United States, and La Coneja, from Argentina, break up after an intense relationship because neither of them was willing to emigrate to stay together. One night, Katie shows up unexpectedly to "end things on better terms."

results.title: Lafesse, pourvu que ça dure... toujours !
results.original_title: Lafesse, pourvu que ça dure... toujours !

results.title: Natural Balance
results.overview: A film student obsessed with making a movie about loneliness grabs his camera and sets out chasing old men. It seems he finally manages to catch up with one of them.

results.title: PLEASE
results.overview: A dark comedy about humankind’s desire to love and to be loved. Centred around neediness, intimacy and romance.  Told through a series of loosely connected, tender and absurd scenes, the film follows people who are searching for closeness and acceptance. In a world that preaches self-control, the film explores the sides we try to hide, such as feeling needy and pathetic.  The stories overlap and reappear, gradually forming a portrait of collective longing.

results.title: Her First Taste
results.overview: Wen Yuwen, a cute and naive high school girl, loves Chinese far more than math. She tentatively steps into billiard halls, clothing stores and hotels — places of the adult world. She also begins to confront growing pains: relationships with the opposite sex, studying abroad, and her father’s infidelity. Confused yet brave at times, she embarks on a stumbling adventure of youth.

results.title: Illuminada
results.overview: "Iluminada" follows a young woman whose mysterious visions lead her into a forbidden romance with Juan, drawing the attention of powerful forces controlling her neighbourhood.

results.title: Getafe II
results.overview: Getafe II, a shopping center suspended between past and present, reveals the fascination and fragility of nostalgia.

results.title: JACKPOT!
results.overview: When a young man hides the truth about his lottery ticket winnings from his friend, conflict erupts.

results.title: Top
results.overview: Finally at the hospital for his long awaited gender affirming top surgery, Matt Levit, with lively girlfriend Leisha Meyer by his side, navigates the bureaucracy of the top surgery process. But once Matt is thrown deep into surgery day, he suddenly finds his present intertwining with his past self, Kimberly. Plunging through past and present, Matt is dropped into confronting his relationship with his chest and sudden loss of his mother, Nancy.

results.title: Roberto Zucco
results.overview: One night, Roberto Zucco escapes from the prison where he was incarcerated for the murder of his father. Thus begins a dizzying escape, punctuated by encounters that illustrate a quest for identity.

results.title: The Deliverer
results.overview: Facundo is an eccentric man with a variety of jobs and interests, but few people remember one of his greatest talents. After years of being sidelined in the industry, he receives a call with an offer he can’t refuse. He’ll become The Deliverer once again.

results.title: Lesbian Lines
results.overview: In a silenced Ireland, a community of lesbians builds an underground network of helplines - offering connection, survival, and defiance through the simple act of answering the phone.

results.title: Shells: Shaped by Nature
results.overview: Since the dawn of time, Nature has sculpted the oceans with her delicate hand, weaving the tapestry of life in the shimmering depths and sunlit shallows. With infinite care, she conjured snails and mollusks to inhabit diverse marine realms around the African continent, each a reflection of her boundless creativity and wisdom. These delicate spirals, with their tender curves, ensnare our imagination, inspiring art, shaping cultures, adorning garments, and even serving as currency in ancient economies. "Shells: Shaped by Nature" is an artistic tribute to the enigmatic splendor of shells, celebrating these intricate marvels that grace Africa’s marine realms.

results.title: Baba
results.overview: Gourab, a journalist raised in an orphanage, dreams of becoming the perfect father more than a successful reporter. But when a dangerous child trafficking racket terrorizes Kolkata, he is forced to balance his duties as a husband, father, and journalist while risking everything to protect innocent children and uncover the truth.

results.title: Infinity Mirror
results.overview: During a tense encounter in a bar bathroom, Bash gets trapped in a time loop with his ex-best friend—and his only hope of escape is to confront what tore them apart.

results.title: Мы с отцом
results.overview: Short film by actress Anastasia Kuimova.

results.title: Flora & Airto: O Som Revolucionário
results.overview: A feature-length musical documentary about the history of the celebrated musician couple Flora Purim and Airto Moreira, who helped shape the global music scene from the 1970s onward as pioneers of jazz fusion. Set against a present-day recording session, the film interweaves the artists’ personal and professional lives, past and present.

results.title: Roots and Wings
results.overview: Maja is searching for traces of her past. As a small child, she and her mother, a street clown, took each day as it came, not knowing where they’d be spending the night. By chance their journey took them to a village on the Italian coast. A life as if carried on wings, yet one with no roots, as Marie could not provide them. It was only when living with her grandfather that Maja was able to have something resembling a home.

results.title: The Hunter and The Hunted
results.overview: Two boys rustle the feathers of a ruthless hunter and find themselves in an intense chase that will test their teamwork and will to survive.

results.title: The Kalgan Horse
results.overview: In the borderlands of farming and herding in northern China, a Mongolian horse awaits the fate of castration, while a 10-year-old boy, determined to protect it, must confront violence and cruelty beyond his understanding.

results.title: The Third Child
results.overview: In a century where humanity has lost its way and boundaries no longer exist, a mother transforms her grief into a final act of hope and resistance.

results.title: Six Weeks On
results.overview: While the world is in lockdown as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, Lore has to cope with a painful loss: her mother has died. Back in the small town of Erkelenz in North Rhine-Westphalia, she struggles against entrenched family structures and a paralyzing bureaucracy. Above all, she has to find a way to come to terms with the death and say goodbye to her mother.

results.title: Strangers in the Mountain
results.overview: In the 1990s, two police officers ventured into the mountains along Zhejiang's Shanxi Stream to track down a suspect from an old case. As they dug deeper into the past, long-buried memories resurfaced, stirring poignant recollections among everyone involved about Zhang Xue, the person who had gone missing.

results.title: The Blistering Blundering West
results.overview: A bumbling, lovestruck cowboy stumbles through the western frontier, overcoming a series of comical obstacles in the hopes of making it on time for a date with the potential love of his life.

results.title: Rod Quantock Comedy Warrior
results.overview: This feature documentary charts Rod Quantock’s five-decade career and his tireless efforts to communicate the perils of neoliberalism and the urgency of climate change through humour. His journey illustrates the building of the thriving comedy landscape we take for granted today, showcasing a man who has remained steadfast in his pursuit of truth in an hilarious fashion.

results.title: Girls & Gods
results.overview: Can feminism and religion coexist? Inna Shevchenko of the Ukrainian FEMEN collective seeks answers to a difficult question in candid conversations with priests, imams, rabbis and other activists.

results.title: Kashmir 1947
results.overview: Kashmir 1947 vividly recounts the tumultuous events of 1947–48, drawing on firsthand testimonies, military perspectives, seldom-seen archives, and a captivating narrative. The documentary weaves together music, songs, and potent narration, presenting history in a way that resonates with modern viewers, even those of a younger generation.  "Kashmir 1947" is a documentary that educates, resonates, and stirs the soul. The film transforms history, crafting a compelling narrative that resonates with contemporary audiences.

results.title: Try!
results.overview: Four Irish Rugby teams who defy stereotypes tackle their way to the Mixed Ability Rugby World Cup, where full-contact sport meets joyful belonging.

results.title: Pauline
results.overview: In a bar, Pauline writes to a man she does not know. Between desire, art, and projection, reality eventually begins to crack the story she has invented for herself.

results.title: Биостанция Анива: дело длинной воли
results.overview: The history of the Aniva biological station, when it was just being assembled from people, ideas, tents, drawings, and other things.

results.title: Night of Blindness
