results.overview: The military junta seized parliamentary rule on September 12, 1980.  Hundreds of thousands of people have been arrested across the country and torture and executions continue. Leaders of various trade unions, associations and student organizations, who are being pursued by the intelligence services, are seeking ways to illegally leave Turkey's borders. Intelligence units are turning a blind eye to a pirate action to trap the leaders.  New film by Reis Çelik.

results.title: You Cut My Wings - Jonabug
results.overview: A missing girl stumbles upon an amusement park where she tries to find happiness while being hunted by her worst fears materialize in the shape of scissors.

results.title: Cassowary
results.overview: Three generations of women — grandmother, mother and daughter — live in a house on a remote island. The grandmother remains silent all day long, while the mother drowns her sorrows in alcohol. The younger brother never truly grows up. The daughter Su Min chooses to leave and works as a bird scarer at an airport. After a fire breaks out at home, she returns to the island with tangled emotions. The arrival of a mysterious fire-eating bird shatters the long-standing peace, gradually unearthing the family’s long-buried secrets and repressed feelings.

results.title: Chasing Light
results.overview: Man rides his bike from home to chase the sunset.

results.title: Ezra Collective: Radio 1's Big Weekend 2026
results.overview: Figureheads for the British jazz explosion, the Mercury-winners close the New Music Stage.

results.title: Lady Macbeth Was Never a Girl
results.original_title: Lady Macbeth Was Never a Girl
results.overview: A school term, a pair of forgotten joggers, a line from Macbeth - in the ordinary spaces of uniformed days, one student starts to notice a quiet disconnect between who they are and who they're expected to be.

results.title: Node
results.overview: A poignant exploration of childhood illness, resilience, and family.

results.title: Blue Lullaby
results.overview: A young girl retraces her relationship with her mother while they bake a pie together. Until she starts to remember what she seemed to have forgotten.

results.title: Whipple’s World
results.overview: Attorney by day and beloved entertainment journalist by night, George Whipple has been a staple on NY1 for three decades, including his eponymous show "Whipple's World." Juggling many different hats with aplomb, this documentary debut shows just how fascinating Whipple’s eccentric life is.

results.title: Symbiosis
results.overview: A weekend reunion at an isolated house turns sinister when old friends realise their host, and the house itself, may want more than their company.

results.title: The Shark Next Door
results.overview: When global warming forced sharks to develop motor skills to survive amongst humans, Elliot, a kind-hearted young man, falls in love with Finn, a brooding and solitary shark

results.title: 犀牛
results.overview: The day before their wedding, she told him she didn’t want children and may never will. The Rhino follows their marriage 11 years later, exploring how this conflict shapes their relationship. Through reenacted memories and lived moments, the film observes how love, grief, and tenderness coexist alongside an irreconcilable difference.

results.title: Abnormal business
results.overview: When a group of five teenagers, working for a paranormal investigating company, enter the haunted home of a random Dutch man, they realize the horrors of what they are about to face.

results.title: Abnormal business
results.overview: When a group of five teenagers, working for a paranormal investigating company, enter the haunted home of a random Dutch man, they realize the horrors of what they are about to face.

results.title: The Quiet After
results.overview: In a near-future society where grief is erased by law, Noah wakes up with fragments of an unknown woman after a near-fatal accident. Drawn into therapy and reassured by a trusted friend, he begins to piece together the unbearable truth. His search for her, and for himself, becomes an act of defiance against a world that values compliance over love.  Haunted by memory and hunted by the system, Noah is forced to confront the cost of remembering, and the deeper cost of letting go.

results.title: Falling to Heaven
results.overview: After having a dream where they claim God told them that they have 7 days left to live, Charlie goes on a spiritual journey to find answers whist also experiencing the five stages of grief.

results.title: To Dream Perhaps
results.overview: Three Tunisian female DJs follow their passion for music while trying to find their own path between Tunis and Berlin.

results.title: Son sang chuchote mon nom
results.overview: After yet another rape, a young woman kills her partner. Behind her  back, out of her sight, her skin slowly necrotizes, as if the trauma she  thought she had buried is slowly taking her with it.

results.title: My Mother’s Story
results.overview: At the age of seventeen, Zahide is married off to a man fifteen years her senior. Within the sixth month of their marriage, her husband passes away, leaving her pregnant. A few months later, she gives birth to their child.Soon after, Zahide’s sister is also married—this time to the younger brother of Zahide’s late husband. When her sister, too, is widowed while carrying a child and already raising three others, Zahide is compelled, against her will, to marry the surviving brother of her deceased husband. Bound by the constraints of their time, the two sisters come to share not only the same household but also the same destiny.  Their lives unfold as a profound testimony to the harshest realities imposed upon women, where personal desire yields to societal pressure, and survival necessitates the surrender of choice. This narrative portrays the endurance of two sisters navigating an oppressive system, their shared sorrow echoing the struggles of countless women silenced by history.

results.title: A Film to Remind Us of Utopia
results.original_title: Um Filme para Lembrar da Utopia
results.overview: In Esdras Baptista's film archives, kept at his home for decades, one can feel the fervor of those who believed in a new tomorrow. Filmed in Brazil in the early 1960s, in the heat of a libertarian political movement, the filmmaker's images materialize the incandescence of collective desires at the historic moment of their emergence. Utopia, though unattainable, is never a mere abstraction. A force that mobilizes actions and feelings, it constitutes the impetus necessary for human existence.

results.title: MARKS/MARKS
results.overview: MARKS/MARKS examines the relationship between the mark making of optical lens technologies (writing with light) and the mark making of painting within the context of digital technology and mass data.  The film maps the movement of painter Dr Harrison Waed See in the studio painting to generate the tempo and trigger audio and visual effects. Similarly digital image sonification and digital data sonifcation of still and moving images of Dr See were used to generate further noise and visual effects.  Alongside this, the soundtrack also includes amplifcations of the sound of his movements and paint brush.

results.title: Valluvan
results.overview: When a string of high-profile murders rocks the city, investigators uncover a dark secret linking the victims to an unspeakable crime. But even after the alleged killer is caught, the killings don’t stop—revealing a far deeper conspiracy where justice comes at a deadly price.

results.title: The Memory of Butterflies
results.overview: A photo of two indigenous boys brought by force to Europe opens an investigation of the past with meditations on the filmmaker’s own family using roughly textured analogue footage. A monument for the indigenous victims of the rubber trade in Peru.

results.title: Dudley & the Invasion of the Space Slugs
results.original_title: Dudley & the Invasion of the Space Slugs
results.overview: Dudley is a teenage frog who lives a peaceful life by the edge of his pond with his friends, meanwhile his parents are worried about his future. But when aliens land on Earth, Dudley's world is thrown into chaos. What if he has what it takes to become a hero and save the whole of humanity?

results.title: Hope is Hip
results.overview: In a seaside town, a group of young skateboarders finds themselves in a feud with a neighbor when their local skatepark is threatened with closure.

results.title: Absolution
results.overview: A minister visits a grieving family in the midst of a missing mother, and finds evil lurking in their home.

results.title: Scratch And Whine
results.overview: A desperate dog owner decides to take care of an old woman at a house in the middle of nowhere.

results.title: At Home
results.overview: At Home is an intergenerational documentary exploring queer friendship as a way of life. Through the voices of a 29-year-old trans musician and a 79-year-old lesbian archivist, the film weaves together stories of self-discovery, chosen family, and community building - from jam sessions and shared gatherings to the legacy of the Brick Hut Café and the Bay Area Lesbian Archives.

results.title: The Bait
results.overview: Rosie and Annie’s love has always felt unshakable, but old tensions resurface with the disappearance of their cat Ripley. When Rosie is visited by a divine presence, she is compelled to undergo the ultimate test.

results.title: Magazine Dreams
results.overview: When Mia gets offered the chance of a lifetime to become the cover star of a magazine by Pierre, she thinks all of her dreams are finally coming true. But when she arrives on set, she quickly realises it's not the glamorous life she thought it would be.

results.title: Jazzystan
results.overview: Film about one of Russia's most unusual indie bands, Dagestani jazz band "No, you're kidding".

results.title: No Shit, Sherlock!
results.overview: A murder has been committed and a detective is on the case... one of them, at least.

results.title: Scuffle in the Lou
results.overview: A lunch, a bathroom, a brawl, and a wallet.

results.title: Between Faces
results.overview: The artist, who never met her grandfather, traces his presence through a photograph and images from Yasukuni Shrine. Guided by her father’s fragmented memories, she reconstructs an absent figure. Through reversals of images, bodies, and landscapes, the film explores shifting perspectives, revealing hidden layers of time, history, and memory.

results.title: KPOP Smoothie
results.overview: A broke Korean American student walks into a KPOP themed smoothie store and unknowingly orders a overpriced smoothie.

results.title: Maya
results.overview: When Charlie believes he has met the love of his life,  Maya,  he starts documenting their relationship, but things don’t turn out the way Charlie wants it to.

results.title: Three Heroes. Daily Tales 3
results.original_title: Три богатыря. Ни дня без подвига 3

results.title: Yet to be Named
results.original_title: 名前をつけるのは、これから

results.title: Hope is a Word
results.overview: In Nigeria's Niger Delta, where oil extraction has poisoned the land for decades, poet and activist Nnimmo Bassey nurtures a new generation of writers to fight back.

results.title: Esquecendo Cacá
results.overview: After ruining yet another friendship, Alina finds herself tormented by the fear of eternal loneliness and decides to try to reconnect with Cacá, the only girl she never fought with.

results.title: 963 Days: The Story of a President who Put Brazil Back on Track
results.original_title: 963 Dias: A História de um Presidente que Recolocou o Brasil nos Trilhos
results.overview: A documentary that chronicles the political trajectory of former president Michel Temer (MDB) during the 963 days he was in charge of the Planalto Palace.

results.title: Hunter's Moon
results.overview: After a successful season in the Upper Dhauladhar Mountains, a hunter hides his meat in a cave and heads home with his first load. At home, his wife is upset over his prolonged absence and its impact on their disabled daughter. He promises to return quickly and the next morning, sets out to retrieve the rest of the meat and leave the forest for the season. To his dismay, he finds the cave empty and the meat stolen. Using his hunter instincts he launches a desperate search through the  treacherous mountain, discovering that the rival is just as cunning. In this quest for meat, humans behave no differently than wild animals. Battling harsh conditions and difficult terrains, they go to all extremes to prove themselves stronger and more deserving. This allegorical tale of conflicting morals and twisted values reveals the true nature of man in the wild.

results.title: Her Magic Carpet
results.overview: Seven-year-old Xiao Xu loves playing the magic carpet game with her grandmother. Through this game, she could move freely around the house. But on this particular day, Grandma refused to play with Xiao Xu anymore because she couldn't pull her along. Feeling lonely, Xiao Xu made a wish upon the magic carpet with all her might—"I'm so bored! Is there anyone who can play with me?" Unexpectedly, when the magic carpet covered Xiao Xu, something magical happened...!

results.title: REO: The Dangerous Peak
results.overview: A documentary following a young mountaineer, Yashwanth Naik, on an expedition to Mount Reo Purgyil in Himachal Pradesh.

results.title: Tracing Paper
results.overview: Follow the preservation of vintage paper through past, present, and future.

results.title: The Big Ashtray
results.overview: In a closed room, a man prepares for the arrival of an unknown figure who brings eternal rapture.

results.title: Instrucciones Para Cocinar Un Pollo Bajo Tierra
results.original_title: Instrucciones Para Cocinar Un Pollo Bajo Tierra

results.title: Close Friends
results.overview: Lauren had a transformative year. Her friends on the internet helped her through it.

results.title: Sea of Whales
results.overview: Director Lee Jeong-joon's distills more than a decade of patient observation, unwavering dedication, and profound ecological insight. Long known as the "Dolphin Man" for his commitment to documenting the lives of Jeju's Indo-Pacific bottlenose dolphins, Lee crafts a film that compels us to fundamentally reconsider our relationship with the sea—a space shared by both human and non-human beings.

results.title: Swamped
results.overview: A 19 year old college student named Rowan lives through a day in her life, which means constant agony in her own brain. Rowan is trapped in a battle with herself, dealing with her obsessions and compulsions, as well as trying to adjust to a new social life.

results.title: Eclogues
results.overview: Landscapes are permeable, impermanent. They are hallucinations of literature, manifestations of human manipulation. Like the pixel, they are degraded, rearranged, forgotten. “Eclogues” is an expression of landscape in the purest principles of digital image-making: duration, practicality, limitation. Shot in 2020 in Strafford, Vermont.

results.title: Everything Must Go
results.overview: EVERYTHING MUST GO is a comedy short filmed in real time as a cis/trans lesbian couple gets married, gives away their possessions, sells their house, and flees the US to escape anti-trans legislation.

results.title: Territory
results.overview: Girl is kidnapped by her own body. In the labyrinth of her inner self, the girl must face the obsessions and desires of a person who is doomed to food—ever-present and painfully tempting. The film explores a toxic relationship with one's body. It shows the illness from an internal perspective, emphasizing confusion, loneliness, and of loss of control—emotions that are often invisible but deeply embedded in the everyday lives of people struggling with eating disorders.

results.title: 49 Miles More
results.overview: On their way to an annual reunion with university friends, Max—an unlucky insurance salesman struggling to find his place in life—and his carefree best friend Doug hit an unexpected roadblock when their car breaks down in the middle of nowhere.

results.title: The Pink Funeral
results.overview: A transgender Chinese girl on the brink of crossing over to the afterlife embarks on a comedic struggle back on Earth to ensure the proper burial of her body, ultimately leading to a profound reconciliation with her mother and acceptance of her true identity.

results.title: Corpus
results.overview: Diane loves coding, but her dream is to become a journalist at the prestigious Nowgazine. When her boyfriend lands the job for himself, war is declared.

results.title: VENDETTA-THE BEAST WITHIN
results.overview: An assassin’s brutal past collides with fate, igniting relentless revenge.

results.title: THE SCRIPT: A Semi-Satirical, Possibly Pretentious, Meta-Commentary Lamenting the Hopeful Pipe Dreams of Every Aspiring Movie Maker
results.original_title: THE SCRIPT: A Semi-Satirical, Possibly Pretentious, Meta-Commentary Lamenting the Hopeful Pipe Dreams of Every Aspiring Movie Maker
results.overview: Aspiring auteur director John tries to get his overly ambitious script turned into a real film.

results.title: A Last Big Story
results.overview: Jon Snow comes out of retirement for one last investigation, travelling to Zambia to uncover a mining disaster being covered up by officials.

results.title: NJPW Dominion 6.14 In Osaka-Jo Hall
results.overview: Dominion 6.14 In Osaka-Jo Hall was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on June 14, 2026, at Osaka-jō Hall in Osaka, Japan. The show was headlined by an IWGP Heavyweight Championship match between reigning champion Callum Newman and Yota Tsuji, who earned a title shot after pinning Newman in a tag team match at New Japan Road In Karatsu 2026 ~ Ignition to Dominion in May 2026.

results.title: Heaven 17: The Last Temptation
results.overview: Sheffield synth legends Heaven 17 hit the road for what might be their final tour, facing up to age, loyalty and unfinished business with the past.

results.title: JIĀ: A Taiwan Story
results.overview: Upcoming Hugh J. Service Taiwan Documentary.

results.title: S·G·N·A·L
results.overview: A young PlayView channel owner, dedicated to preserving and digitizing archived television footage across the United States, discovers a mysterious DVD containing recordings of a signal hijacking incident from 2007. The broadcast, once belonging to a Mexican television channel that aired in California, reveals a disruption that was never officially explained.

results.title: Yu & Me
results.overview: When a fire destroys a beloved Chinatown bookstore, its hyper-independent owner learns that community is necessary for survival.

results.title: THE CAGE WITHIN
results.overview: A true fight isn’t fought in the ring, but inside the mind.  The Cage Within follows Jake, a young fighter struggling with anger, trauma and the weight of expectations, as he tries to break the cycle of violence that shaped him. Between training, silence and fractured relationships, the film observes a man who chooses not to become what hurt him — even when that choice hurts more.  An intimate, restrained drama about masculinity, control and the quiet cost of change.

results.title: Retratos de una mujer en el éter
results.original_title: Retratos de una mujer en el éter

results.title: Labyrinthine
results.overview: Jesse finds herself in a strange, dream-like Labyrinth after a relationship ending argument with her girlfriend. In order to escape, she must confront her own faults.

results.title: Vo Ladki
results.overview: Pathik, decides to move on from every memory of Devyani and goes to meet her one last time with a thought of returning the wrist watch.

results.title: Moon Song
results.overview: After the loss of her grandad, Ash gets stuck in a depressing cycle of loneliness and grief and struggles to get her life together.

results.title: MGA MAGICAL 10 YEARS ANNIVERSARY LIVE ～FJORD～ ON SCREEN
results.original_title: MGA MAGICAL 10 YEARS ANNIVERSARY LIVE ～FJORD～ ON SCREEN

results.title: Летом всякое бывает. Побег из Сколбора
results.original_title: Летом всякое бывает. Побег из Сколбора
results.overview: Eleven-year-old Zlata becomes overly engrossed in gaming during the holidays, ignoring her parents requests to clean up the dishes, review math homework, and walk the dog. Her father confiscates Zlata's gaming devices for the rest of the holidays. Zlata is deeply upset and, before going to bed, wishes, "To play forever, without any limits!" In the morning, Zlata's wish comes true, and she finds herself playing the game, but soon realizes that playing 24/7 isn't as exciting as she thought.

results.title: Тазы
results.overview: Together with his like-minded associates, Rashid is striving to secure recognition for the Tazy as a distinct dog breed, as well as its recognition at the international level. After all, officially there exists only the category of "Central Asian Sighthound," which encompasses a multitude of varieties—including the Tazy. For Rashid, the Tazy is not merely a variety, but a unique cultural phenomenon that demands careful preservation.

results.title: Rebecca Horn – The Secret Life of Things
results.original_title: Rebecca Horn - Die Seele der Dinge
results.overview: This film explores the complex body of work by Rebecca Horn, whose kinetic objects, installations, and films expanded the concept of art in the 20th century. Her work paved the way for future generations of artists. Director Claudia Müller explores Horn’s work within the context of her time and examines its significance in the present day.

results.title: The Lion Queen
results.overview: You’ve seen her face on the cover of countless newspapers. Now step into the larger-than-life world and surprising true story of a true New York original — socialite Jocelyne Wildenstein, a.k.a. “The Lion Queen.”

results.title: Acting Like Women
results.overview: A documentary that explores the explosive rise of feminist performance art in 1970s Los Angeles, where artists connected to the Woman’s Building challenged sexism and redefined art through bold explorations of body, gender, and identity. Directed by artist and filmmaker Cheri Gaulke, who was part of the movement herself, the documentary combines archival footage and artist interviews to capture the creativity, activism, and community that shaped this groundbreaking era. Executive produced by Lily Tomlin alongside her longtime partner Jane Wagner, the film traces the origins and lasting influence of feminist performance art.

results.title: INDEPENDIENTE
results.overview: Three Mexican filmmakers — Max del Río, Gabriela Ivette Sandoval, and Hugo Villaseñor Alcázar — share their processes and challenges around a single question: How can an independent film get seen? Through the eyes of insiders, the documentary reveals the complex journey behind making cinema visible in Mexico.

results.title: dude. where is my lighter?
results.overview: A young man wanders the streets of Shawnee, Oklahoma, searching for the thing that will bring him peace.

results.title: Peeled Eyes
results.overview: Joseph is an aspiring illustrator suffering from insomnia. One night at 2:48am, he attempts to reignite his creative spark when he summons an entity that wishes to be completed. Immersed in his new-found motivation, Joseph is blinded by passion and becomes the cost of his own creation.

results.title: Raft Race
results.overview: While camping with her family for the annual raft race, Frankie (11) is suddenly thrust into awareness of her developing body and how the world will perceive her.

results.title: Ultimate Thunder
results.overview: A punk band whose members have learning disabilities and Down syndrome fight to reach a bigger stage as funding cuts, health scares and setbacks close in.

results.title: Labors of Love: The Life and Legacy of Henrietta Szold
results.original_title: Labors of Love: The Life and Legacy of Henrietta Szold
results.overview: Long overlooked yet hugely influential, a towering Jewish American humanitarian finally receives her due in this inspiring biography of the visionary Zionist and women’s rights leader who helped shape modern Jewish life. As founder of Hadassah, builder of a modern healthcare and social service system in pre-state Israel, and fierce advocate for education and Jewish–Arab cooperation, Henrietta Szold was a force of nature who galvanized a global network of Jewish women. Her boldest achievement, Youth Aliyah, rescued thousands of Jewish children from Nazi-occupied Europe. Through archival footage, intimate letters, and firsthand reflections lifted by Tovah Feldshuh’s stirring narration, this rousing tribute honors a trailblazer whose moral clarity, courage, and humanity continue to echo today.

results.title: Time In A Bottle
results.overview: After receiving the devastating news of his father’s death in reserve duty, Alon is mysteriously transported to a surreal room where he is given a device that allows him to travel back in time. Driven by grief and regret, Alon tries repeatedly to change the past and prevent his father from leaving, only to discover that some things cannot be changed-but they can be faced differently. A moving story about sacrifice, memory, and the power of a final goodbye.

results.title: Dave vs. Hollywood
results.overview: Dave is an actor who moves to Los Angeles, completely devoid of connections and contacts. The humiliations and indignities soon pile up. After a fruitless struggle, Dave decides to make his mark by taking a non-traditional, unorthodox, 'anything goes' approach — he joins AA for connections; joins Scientology to network; considers donating a kidney to an aging movie star in exchange for a role in said aging star’s film; leaves his headshot and reel on the windshields of vehicles outside the Brentwood church where a funeral for a studio executive is taking place, etc.

results.title: Fruits de Merde
results.overview: A continuous shot tracks a family during their traditional New Year’s Eve throughout the years, when on one night a winning scratch card lands on the table.

results.title: Sheesh, A Taylor Love Story
results.overview: Follows Mac Coronel, a call center agent by day and drag performer by night, whose viral Taylor Swift–inspired performances transform malls and plazas across Manila into sanctuaries of joy and belonging.

results.title: Savage Mountain
results.overview: Kristin Harila risked everything to summit the world’s 14 highest peaks at record speed. When her final ascent sparked backlash, her greatest triumph became a reckoning.

results.title: Couture to the Max
results.overview: At just 9-years-old, fashion prodigy Max Alexander fearlessly fuses his boundless imagination with an unwavering commitment to sustainability, inspiring us to dream boldly and act responsibly.

results.title: Alicia Keys: Girl From Hell’s Kitchen
results.original_title: Alicia Keys: Girl From Hell’s Kitchen
results.overview: Alicia Keys reflects on her childhood growing up in Manhattan's Hell's Kitchen and the journey that led her from the gritty streets of 90s New York to the Broadway stage in Tribeca.

results.title: Jaffa's Stories 2
results.overview: A sequel to the theatrical film "Jaffa's Stories", based on the books by Menachem Talmi and the TV show adaptation.

results.title: On a Stringer
results.overview: At noon, in the shade of riverside trees — as if in the middle of life — you lose something. Yet love is as strong as the river. A man is going through abrupt changes in his life — both personal and caused by the war. He spends a day alone by the river, revisiting a forgotten hobby — fishing. A sense of love and acceptance fills him, but only for a brief moment — he must return to the war.

results.title: 'Mr. Paradise'
results.overview: Rejected by the person he changed for, Tyler Terry, a picture-perfect boy must become who he truly is after losing himself to being someone else's paradise.

results.title: SHAMDEMONIUM
results.overview: Young aspiring actress Barb drowns in the pool of a kids birthday party, and must survive in a new thespian purgatory.

results.title: The Vacation Begins
results.original_title: バカンスは始まったばかり
results.overview: The beginning of summer. Yuka, who has just divorced Haruki after three years of marriage, goes on vacation to a seaside town with her best friend Shina and her boyfriend Dazai. Reunited with Dazai, who she was once in love with, after a long time, Yuka's feelings for him gradually begin to rekindle. Meanwhile, Shina is attracted to Tenma, a poet who lives in the seaside town. Unrequited feelings and a peaceful daily life. The vacation has only just begun.

results.title: BREAKFAST AT BERGHAIN
results.overview: A small-town girl takes a pilgrimage to the famed German nightclub Berghain and ends up spending years of her life in the hallowed den of drum and bass.

results.title: Safe In My Skin
results.overview: Mikey Liu, a young Chinese American man living in New York City, travels to his hometown for the funeral of his childhood friend, Shaun. As the trip pulls him back into his past, long-buried memories begin to surface, revealing the quiet weight of a complicated friendship.

results.title: ULTRAVIOLETA
results.overview: In a crowded nightclub under violet lights, Avril can’t stop looking at Carla dancing across the room. When a drunk guy starts to make Carla uncomfortable, Avril steps in and that moment brings them together. After hiding out in the bathroom and helping each other out, the connection between them begins to grow.

results.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
results.overview: Marcus, a customer service agent whose job is to help anyone with anything with the aid of Assist-O, a hyper-efficient AI assistant. When the tasks become increasingly bizarre and Assist-O starts taking things too far, Marcus struggles to maintain control, revealing the chaos and absurdity lurking behind the promise of perfect service.

results.title: The Collected Pieces of Eleanor Ross
results.original_title: The Collected Pieces of Eleanor Ross
results.overview: Unsatisfied with her prospects following graduation, struggling artist Eleanor "Nell" Ross reflects on her life with her boyfriend over a game of dominoes.

results.title: We Loved You, Now

results.overview: Two parallel life. living in same city, going through Same problems and have Same desire - To go back HOME.

results.title: Mitjyu
results.overview: A story about two guy bonded with the relationship 'Mitjyu' yet navigating through the complexities with each other.

results.overview: When a game night turns into a challenge, Pedro decides to take matters into his own hands and find the right gallery for his paintings.

results.title: Restless
results.overview: After losing his parents in an accident, Jason Gaterson slowly begins going crazy

results.title: A Quiet House
results.overview: SHE’S ALWAYS BEEN AN OLD SOUL Sian and Lewis, are a married couple spend who their days attempting to reach out to their daughter, Hope. Sian brings meals to their room whilst Lewis waits and listens. However, the couple are stuck in a loop that conceals reality. The evening brings warmth and comfort, whilst the harsh morning light reveals the truth of what lies beyond Hope’s door.

results.title: The Apologist
results.overview: Through the ritual of saying sorry, a bold journey explores how apologies redefine history and what happens to us as witnesses to the act of atonement.

results.title: Morals & Status
results.overview: Three Venezuelans teenagers Rodrigo, Marcelo, and Alexa get profiled at a store which leads to the an altercation with immigration.

results.title: Kichka: Telling Myself
results.overview: At age 67, after reaching the top of the illustration world in Israel and beyond, Michel Kichka was forced to give up his place at the Bezalel Academy in favor of the younger generation. As a cartoonist, he documented the Zionist dream and its upending: a new and enthusiastic Zionist who came from Belgium to help in the Yom Kippur War turned prophet of doom. The evolution of his cartoons reflects a general deterioration of values ​​across Israeli society, politics, and the memory of the Holocaust. With his talent, he turned into a “rough Jerusalemite” with a Belgian accent who is not afraid to tell us the truth to our faces. To heal himself from the burden of the second generation, Kichka created a graphic novel revealing everything about his family and his father’s silence that led to a family tragedy. This work about the second generation was turned into an animated French feature film that tries to remind the younger generation of the Holocaust.

results.title: Borrowed Ragtime
results.overview: When 1920s Film Star B.K. Silencio finds himself transported to the 21st century by a crazed fan with a time machine, he has no choice but to defend himself in a new world if he wants to return home.

results.title: Black Tea
results.overview: An artist and a collector argue over an antique teacup. They make their cases over a cup of tea and a crush develops.

results.title: The Deepest is the Skin: LGBT60+
results.original_title: O Mais Profundo é a Pele – LGBT60+

results.title: The Chair
results.overview: A short animated film exploring the complex relationship between a little girl, Piku, and her grandfather’s old vintage armchair.

results.title: Ghatak Was Here
results.overview: A personal essay film about the life, death and resurrection of the great Bengali director Ritwik Ghatak

results.title: Talos
results.overview: In a time of loneliness, a father finds peace through his love for his daughter.

results.title: Double Trouble
results.overview: Once upon a time in a Polish village in Romania, Hanka and Bronka, left behind by their deceased husbands and their children who have emigrated for work, face everyday life with humour and persistence. Fighting to stay independent, they will soon need to make a life-changing decision.

results.title: The Way You See Me
results.overview: An intimate story about the construction of identity and the consequences of defying gender norms within Mexico's conservative upper-middle-class society.

results.title: Saving Spoonie
results.overview: Spoonie, the spoon-billed sandpiper, would have long since gone extinct without Dr. Christoph Zöckler and a tight-knit group of international ornithologists. As if that weren’t bad enough, the migration route of this sparrow-sized wading bird—with its peculiar spoon-shaped bill—runs from Russia through North Korea and China all the way to Myanmar, passing through several of the world’s crisis regions of the past decade. The work of the task force is therefore also a political challenge. It requires diplomatic sensitivity in coordinating with the countries along the flyway. In the tragicomic story of Spoonie’s fate, the struggle for threatened biodiversity in an increasingly fragile world is reflected.

results.title: Life Coach
results.overview: A lonely Muay Thai instructor (Mark Bale) seeks self-confidence through an online life-coaching app, gradually surrendering control to an unseen mentor.

results.title: Git-Gel
results.overview: A walking-themed film directed by the legendary leftist director Ali Yaşar Nalcı.

results.title: Noite do Australopithecus
results.overview: After a failed long-distance relationship, an Australopithecus indulges in Brasília's bohemian life, seeking a reconciliation with his past and his own identity.

results.title: So Be It
results.overview: Five senior LGBTQIA+ couples share their resilient love stories, reflecting on identity, aging, and love while offering younger generations inspiring role models.

results.title: The Trip
results.overview: Juni is on a quest of self discovery. So, Juni and her best friend, Gia, visit Trevor, the local drug dealer. When they’re both offered a brownie, Juni takes this opportunity to explore her inner self.

results.title: RiseGoji
results.overview: The 10th anniversary of “Rise Goji” brings us the 5th feature film by acclaimed director Luis Duran.

results.title: Ending Things
results.overview: Henrique's melancholic life becomes a stage for mysteries and suspicions after a dark night in the industrial suburbs of a forgotten city.

results.title: Pomodoro
results.overview: Two aspiring sibling chefs scramble to prepare an elaborate dinner to prove themselves to their harsh food critic mother. As the night unfolds, their talent and ambition shine, but so do buried tensions and long-standing resentment.

results.title: YOU’VE GONE MENTAL
results.overview: When 14-year-old Otis is left home alone, he begins to notice things change around him. Convinced by his friends he’s gone crazy, he is determined to uncover the truth.

results.title: bird's nest (the mourning dove and the cardinal)
results.original_title: bird's nest (the mourning dove and the cardinal)
results.overview: An animated retelling of the directors personal journey with his body as a transgender man from Texas.

results.title: Promises
results.overview: A film director meets his ex-wife after a long separation. As they spend time together, old promises begin to lose the meaning they once had.

results.title: onze again
results.overview: Commissioned for Jogo Cruzado 9.2, a project by Canal180, Culturgest and gnration that connects filmmakers and musicians through a sequential creative process, 'onze again' was conceived as a silent film and later entrusted to Ka Baird for the creation of its soundtrack. Through recurring images, the film builds a playful chain of repetitions, returns and variations.

results.title: Piccolo Miracolo
results.overview: Davide Lancia, a wealthy forty-year-old with refined tastes and a weakness for all things beautiful, from women to art, owes his fortune to being the son of one of Rome's most powerful and unscrupulous builders. To spur him on, his father offers him the opportunity to finally prove himself a worthy heir to his empire: he must demolish a run-down building and build a luxury residence in its place. A deal Davide cannot refuse. However, a tenant still lives in the building who refuses to leave her apartment: Ursula, a blind, beautiful, determined, and feisty woman. His encounter with Ursula will upend Davide's plans and allow him to embrace a new way of living and seeing things.

results.title: Au coeur de l'arène : la vérité sur les jeux romains
results.original_title: Au coeur de l'arène : la vérité sur les jeux romains

results.title: The Intimacy Coordinator
results.overview: A heartbroken man mistakes an intimacy coordinator job posting as a sexual opportunity and is hired by two unhinged theater directors who believe they’ve found the perfect guy for the job.

results.title: The Echoes
results.overview: Set above the clouds, The Echoes is a visual documentary exploring Taiwan’s alpine wilderness. By juxtaposing human traces with nature’s slow rhythm, the film captures the duality of fleeting existence and eternal silence, inviting contemplation on how time eventually reclaims all man-made marks.

results.title: Aimless Monologue Before The Credits...
results.overview: A young man reflects on the past moments of his life just before everything changes forever.

results.title: Ginkgo
results.overview: A woman with dementia, under her daughter's care, drifts between reality and memories of her mother when she was a child.

results.title: The Freedom Fighters
results.overview: An unlikely group of neighbors decide to fight back against their tyrannical HOA president.

results.title: MKO
results.overview: Moshood Abiola wins Nigeria's freest election, only for the military to jail him. When U.S. diplomats arrive to negotiate his release, he is served tea, and dies.

results.title: Whispers of Nature
results.overview: In the mid-1980s, renowned painter Clarke Holler tells a horrifying story from his life on an episode of his painting show "Whispers of Nature"

results.title: The Faggots & Their Friends Between Revolutions
results.original_title: The Faggots & Their Friends Between Revolutions
results.overview: A poetic cinematic envisioning of the legendary queer 1970s manifesto, The F--gots & Their Friends Between Revolutions, this visual meditation constrasts nature’s quiet strength with the rigid architecture of power. In a world where the f--gots and their friends are made of flowers, trees and softness, will they survive against the men of concrete and steel? A story of otherness not as weakness, but as enduring, blooming power.

results.title: two ice creams please
results.overview: During their holiday, two young women get lost in a rainforest. After wandering around for days, their irritation with one another grows. While dreams about ice cream increasingly creep into their reality, they become conscious of their own vulnerability.

results.title: My Dear Watson
results.overview: When he receives a mysterious love note, a teenage Sherlock Holmes must step outside of his comfort zone in order to uncover the identity of his secret admirer.

results.title: Exiled for Existing
results.overview: In 'Exiled for Existing’, more than 40 lesbian, gay, bisexual, trans and queer refugees and asylum-seekers in Glasgow explore the impact of having to flee a place to be yourself.

results.title: ترايثليت
results.overview: A triathlete living and training in Al-Naseem district, exploring how the sport becomes more than just competition, but a way of life built on discipline, endurance, and commitment. Through his daily routine and personal journey, the film highlights the challenges of pursuing an intense sport while balancing everyday life, offering a closer look at ambition and perseverance within an unexpected environment.

results.title: This Land Carries Us
results.overview: This Land Carries Us is a short experimental doc that centers Tewa presence, voice, and memory across ancestral homelands in northern New Mexico. Guided by the voice of the filmmaker’s grandmother, who recites a story written by the filmmaker’s late younger brother in the Tewa language, the film unfolds as a sensory meditation on land, family, and intergenerational connection.

results.title: Диайвай
results.overview: An inspiring and sometimes sad story about the saving power of skateboarding.

results.title: Jeongbaengi
results.overview: In July 2024, record-breaking rains caused the levee to collapse, swallowing Jeongbaengi Village in an instant. Amid the ruins and cold bureaucracy, residents endure their hardships by relying on one another. Cooking meals together in the mud, they begin a journey of recovery. Can the resilience of a community, born from disaster, rebuild lives swept away by the current?
